node.text: James adopted a pup from a shelter in Stamford last week and named it Ned, making his days happier.

node.text: James is willing to introduce John to the organization where he volunteered.

node.text: James introduced three pets - Max, Daisy, and a new pup named Ned, who are slowly adapting and bonding together.
